description_long: This lantern features a hexagonal base and a cylindrical glass enclosure, topped with a pagoda-style metal roof. The main body is constructed from dark green metal, with a prominent, decorative spiral metal band wrapping around the glass. The glass itself appears frosted or clouded, partially obscuring the interior but revealing a central, copper-colored oil lamp or burner. A large, circular metal ring is attached to the top, serving as a hanging mechanism. The overall design is ornate, with subtle embossed patterns on the roof and base, giving it a vintage or traditional aesthetic.
description: A vintage-style hanging lantern with a frosted cylindrical glass body, dark green metal frame, and decorative spiral band.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hexagonal base, pagoda roof, and clear view of the copper burner inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the spiral metal band wrapping around the frosted glass enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with less visibility of the burner and more focus on the glass and frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the spiral band and the frosted glass, with the burner partially visible.
